# Pure. Quantum. Excellence.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/680f93137d021b6f77daed4c/680fc257341f105f31f8127a_Cover.webp)

### **What sets SQC™ apart**
A materials science approach to delivering the first commercial quantum computer.
→
**14|15™ qubits**
What you scale, matters. Our quantum processors only contain two types of atoms: silicon (14) and phosphorus (15). This simplicity allows us to realise the highest fidelity algorithms of any platform.
→
**Full stack**
At the heart of SQC is our ability to control and deliver all through the quantum computing stack, from atomic-scale processor manufacturing to integrated hardware, classical control systems, and software.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/680f93137d021b6f77daed4c/681c6f2a669d45a819e8a6b2_3450.webp)
SQC’s Founder and CEO
Professor **Michelle Simmons**
/ The world's leading materials scientist
Michelle is an internationally acclaimed physicist and materials scientist, renowned for creating the field of atomic electronics.
For 25+ years, she has pioneered the foundational technologies for building computing devices in silicon at atomic scale. She developed both the world’s first single-atom transistor and the first integrated circuit made with atomic precision.
The SQC team is the unequivocal world leader in atomic-scale manufacturing. These technologies are now being scaled to create useful products including machine learning chips, analogue simulators, quantum processors, and quantum computers.
### **Excellence in silicon**
We have the world’s leading experts and minds working on our technology and products.
